text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That was so fun! ♪

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah!
Go, Fine Motion!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Oh man, I've got goosebumps! I feel like getting
out there and running too!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Racing must be so much fun. Ahhh, I wish I was an
Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Hehe. ♪ Everyone has such wonderful
smiles on their faces.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
And what a beautiful autumn sky. Races truly are
splendid... ♪

text_block_list.name: TV Audio
text_block_list.text:
And that brings our coverage of the exhilarating
Shuka Sho to an end! See you all at the next race!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Just like I thought. You really are different from
the others.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Guess I've got no choice if I'm gonna learn more.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In response to Fine Motion's growing popularity
in the wake of the Shuka Sho, we decide to hold a
press conference.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
First, congratulations on your performance in the
Shuka Sho. You ran brilliantly!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text: How was it? And how are you feeling right now?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I feel quite refreshed. Having everyone looking
forward to seeing me run made it so much fun.

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
That was apparent just from watching you. You
were truly fantastic! Now, I have to ask...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Which race is next for you? I'm sure everyone
watching would love to know.

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: My next race...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Fine Motion glances towards me, and I nod back
to her. There's only one answer—her major
objective!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: I'm aiming for the Queen Elizabeth II Cup.

text_block_list.name: Reporters
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
That stands to reason based on your
accomplishments so far! You've taken on the tiara
races, so now it's time to vie for racing
queendom!

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see that broadcast? Fine Motion's
going to run in the next Queen Elizabeth II Cup!

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I saw it! Boy, it'd be wild if she actually won
it! I definitely gotta see that in person!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. The press conference was a smashing
success. Everyone has such high hopes for me!
choice_data_list: You'll need to steel yourself and stay focused.
You'll need to steel yourself and stay focused.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unlike the Classics, racers in their senior year can
also enter the Queen Elizabeth II Cup. I tell Fine
Motion that we'll have to be at the top of our
game when...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Now hold on just a second!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kawakami Princess, the fierce Umamusume with
"Princess" in her name, appears before us.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I saw your press conference! You're running in the
Queen Elizabeth II Cup, right?!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: That's right. Is there some kind of problem?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
In that case, it's settled! The two of us must do
battle!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'm running in the Queen Elizabeth II Cup too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I mean, c'mon...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
"Princess" is right there in my name! I'm not letting
anyone take the throne from me!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Fine Motion! Consider this a challenge! A duel!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text:
Oooh!
Sounds like Fine Motion has a new rival!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
In soccer terms, is this similar to the Kaiser and
the Superstar?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I don't know who they are, but probably! What a
thrilling development!

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
...!
How splendid! What do I say?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
It doesn't look like anyone needs to tell you. I can
see by the look in your eyes that you've accepted
my challenge!

text_block_list.name: Passersby
text_block_list.text: Whoooa!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The headline of the following day's racing
newspaper is "Princess Showdown at the Queen
Elizabeth II Cup!" It's sure to be an electrifying
event!
